query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Annotate', 'To add annotation', 'The author hoped the new policy would annotate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Annuity', 'A specified income payable at stated intervals for period', 'The essay highlights the annuity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Annul', 'To formally revoke the validity of', 'The author hoped the new policy would annul tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Annunciation', 'The act of announcing something', 'Her annunciation became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anode', 'Electrode of an electrochemical cell where oxidation occurs', 'The essay highlights the anode of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anoint', 'To rub or sprinkle on', 'Critics argued that the plan might anoint the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anomalous', 'Deviating from the norm or expectations', '“The scientist noted an anomalous result in the experiment.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anomaly', 'Something that deviates from normal', 'He anomaly overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anonymity', 'The quality or state of being anonymous, anonymousness', 'The essay highlights the anonymity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antagonism', 'A strong natural dislike or hatred, antipathy', 'Scholars noted a striking antagonism between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antagonist', 'A person or thing that opposes or competes with another; an adversary', 'The essay highlights the antagonist of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antagonistic', 'Showing active opposition', 'The reviewer described the tone as antagonistic, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ante', 'Risks, stakes', 'Scholars noted a striking ante between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antecede', 'To go before, to precede', 'The author hoped the new policy would antecede tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antecedent', 'A thing that existed before another', 'The essay highlights the antecedent of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antechamber', 'A small room used as an entryway area to a larger room', 'Over time, the community learned to antechamber its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antedate', 'To occur before an event or time, to predate', 'Over time, the community learned to antedate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antediluvian', 'Extremely old or outdated', 'What seemed antediluvian at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antemeridian', 'Of or relating to morning, that happens in the morning', 'The author hoped the new policy would antemeridian tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antemundane', 'Being or occurring prior to the creation of the world', 'Over time, the community learned to antemundane its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antenatal', 'Occurring or existing before birth', 'Scholars noted a striking antenatal between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anterior', 'Before in place', 'Scholars noted a striking anterior between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anteroom', 'A waiting room, a small room before a larger one', 'Her anteroom became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthology', 'A book or collection of writings', 'Her anthology became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthracite', 'A slow-burning coal', 'Scholars noted a striking anthracite between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthropocentric', 'Giving preference to humans above all other considerations', 'The author hoped the new policy would anthropocentric tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthropoid', 'Having characteristics of a human being', 'The reviewer described the tone as anthropoid, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthropology', 'The holistic scientific and social study of humanity', 'Scholars noted a striking anthropology between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Anthropomorphous', 'Resembling a human being', 'What seemed anthropomorphous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antic', 'A ludicrous or extravagant gesture', 'The essay highlights the antic of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antichrist', 'One who works against the teachings of christ', 'The essay highlights the antichrist of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antidepressant', 'A substance that is used in the treatment of mood disorders', 'Scholars noted a striking antidepressant between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antidote', 'A remedy to counteract the effects of poison', 'Critics argued that the plan might antidote the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antigen', 'A toxin that induces an immune response in the body', 'Scholars noted a striking antigen between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antilogy', 'A contradiction in related terms or ideas', 'Her antilogy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antipathy', 'A deep-seated feeling of dislike', 'Her antipathy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiphon', 'A devotional piece of music sung responsively', 'Scholars noted a striking antiphon between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiphony', 'Alternate, responsive singing by a two part choir', 'Her antiphony became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antipod', 'Any two places that are on opposite sides of the earth', 'Her antipod became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiquary', 'A person who is knowledgeable of, or who collects antiques', 'The essay highlights the antiquary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiquate', 'To cause to become old or obsolete', 'Critics argued that the plan might antiquate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiquated', 'Old-fashioned or outdated', 'The reviewer described the tone as antiquated, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antique', 'Of, or belonging to the past, not modern', 'Over time, the community learned to antique its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antiseptic', 'Of, or relating to antisepsis, or the use of antiseptics', 'The author hoped the new policy would antiseptic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antislavery', 'Opposed to the practice of slavery', 'The author hoped the new policy would antislavery tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antispasmodic', 'Referring to something that suppresses spasms, like a drug', 'The author hoped the new policy would antispasmodic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antistrophe', 'The second section of an ancient Greek choral ode', 'Her antistrophe became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antithesis', 'A direct opposite', 'Scholars noted a striking antithesis between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antitoxin', 'A substance, formed in the body, that counters a toxin', 'Her antitoxin became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Antonym', 'A word which has the opposite meaning of another', 'Her antonym became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
